provisions.title: APPROPRIATION OF FUNDS
provisions.content:
MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO IDOMINGO-
                Executive Order No. 803.
               ADDITION O F THE PENSION LIST.
                             ---
    By virtue of t h e powers v-esteld in t h e Military Government
of Santo Domino, the following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
       ARTICLE 1. In view of the certificate issued by t h e Secre-
t a r y of Interior and Police in accordance with t h e provisions
of Article 7 of Executive Order No. 456, t h e following adidlition
is hereby made t o t h e Pension List provided by Executive Onder
No. 695:
          Lic. Paulino A. Castillo, Santo Domingo City.
          14888     -      $37.50 per month.
       This 'pension shall be effective beginning Jun'e 19, 1922, anid
t h e amount of saild pension is subject to t h e reduction established
by Executive Order No. 744, dated May 18, 1922.

                                   S . S. ROBISON,
                          Rear Admirral, United States Navy,
                         Miilitary Governor of Santo Domingo.

  Santo Domingo, R. D.,
September 22, 1922.

     MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO IDOMINGO.
                     Executive Ordler No. 804.
                 APPROPRIATION O F FUNDS.

    By virtue of t h e powers vested in the Military Government
of Santo Domingo, t h e following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
    ARTICLE 1. There is hereby appropriated from any funlds

in t h e Natio:ial Treasury not otherwise obligaited the sum of
T H R E E THOUSAND DOLLARS ($3,000) to cover t h e cost of
printing special report of t h e Department of Finance and
Commerce f o r t h e years 1920 and 1921, an'd f o r addition'al reve-
z u e stamps and cixpenses incident to the application of t h e
S A L E S TAX LAW, none of which stamps or expenses h a s pre-
viously been provided f o r in the 1922 Budget.

                                    s. s. XONISON,
                          Rela- ACmhaI, United States Navy,
                         NLii1iral.y Govenior of Santo Domingo.

Santo Domingo, R. D.,
September 23, 1922.

      MILITARY GOVERNMENT OF SANTO DBMINGO.
                     Executive Oader No. 805.
                     LAND REGISTRATION.

    B y virtue of t h e powers vested in t h e Milibary Government
of Santo Domingo, t h e following Executive Order is hereby pro-
mulgated :
      ARTICLE 1. The Land Registration Act, Executive Order
No. 511, as amenlded, shall remain in full1 force and effect, subject
t o action by t h e Legislative Power.

                                    S . S. ROEISON,
                           Rear Admilral, United States Navy,
                         Jlinitary Governor of Sianto Domingo.

Sanho Domingo, R. D.,
September 28, 1922.
